name: Thai Barbecued Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the marinade ingredients in a food processor and process to a paste.
2. Place the chicken in a sealable plastic bag with the marinade. Turn the bag several times so the chicken is well coated.
3. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight, turning the bag occasionally to distribute the marinade.
4. Lift the chicken from the marinade and arrange it on a lightly greased grill over low coals.
5. Cook, turning frequently, until the meat near the bone is no longer pink, about 45 minutes. It can also be cooked under the broiler indoors.
